summary: A short social product video moves from skeptical hook to product benefits and a closing recommendation.

transcript.speaker: Creator
transcript.text: Okay, aggressive marketing, but I'm listening.

transcript.speaker: Creator
transcript.text: Raspberry rose, only five grams of sugar, prebiotic stuff for my gut?

transcript.speaker: Creator
transcript.text: Wait, that's actually fire. Seriously though, go grab a case.

frames.caption: Creator reacts to the can on a couch.
Creator holds the product can clearly in frame.
Product is shown close to camera during the recommendation.

segments.title: Skeptical hook
segments.summary: The creator reacts with skepticism but stays curious.

segments.title: Product benefits
segments.summary: The video quickly stacks flavor, low sugar, and prebiotic claims.

segments.title: Taste proof and CTA
segments.summary: The creator tastes the drink, endorses it, and gives a direct recommendation.

claims.claim: The drink has five grams of sugar.
